item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 171530Z AUTO 28009KT 240V310 9999 FEW026 SCT050 BKN072 15/09 Q1013 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA SCT020TCU
